nasb.text: And all were speaking well of Him, and wondering at the gracious words which were falling from His lips; and they were saying, “Is this not Joseph’s son?”

esv.text: And all spoke well of him and marveled at the gracious words that were coming from his mouth. And they said, “Is not this Joseph’s son?”

cnv.text: 眾人稱讚他，希奇他口中所出的恩言，並且說：“這不是約瑟的兒子嗎？”

ccb.text: 大家都称赞祂，听见祂那些充满恩典的话，都感到惊奇，就说：“这不是约瑟的儿子吗？”

csbs.text: 大家都赞许他，对他口里所发出的恩典的话语感到惊奇，又说：“这不就是约瑟的儿子吗？”
